name_en: (With full packaging)!!️ This mini Dionysus bag from the 2023 Early Autumn collection is crafted from beige and white GG Supreme canvas, cleverly incorporating the brand's beloved 3D tiger head buckle. Oatmeal leather trim adds depth to the design, incorporating tonal elements and contrasting textures.
name_cn:
(With full packaging)!!️ This mini Dionysus bag from the 2023 Early Autumn collection is crafted from beige and white GG Supreme canvas, cleverly incorporating the brand's beloved 3D tiger head buckle. Model: 752029
Size: 18*12*6cm
Color: Beige Oatmeal.
